ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft / Reaper) RoKRAT C2 to pCloud / Yandex / Dropbox APIs from non-browser process
ucs.description: Hunts APT37's signature RoKRAT/CHAINSHOT family C2 channel: a non-browser, non-sync-client process beaconing to legitimate cloud-storage REST APIs (pCloud, Yandex Disk, Dropbox, Box). Microsoft tracks this cluster as ScarCruft / InkySquid; CrowdStrike calls it Ricochet Chollima; Mandiant TEMP.Reaper. RoKRAT has used these specific cloud services for C2 since 2017 and continues in M2RAT / ROKRAT samples through 2024.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Web.url) as urls values(Web.dest) as dest values(Web.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Web.Web where (Web.url="*api.pcloud.com*" OR Web.url="*cloud-api.yandex.net*" OR Web.url="*content.dropboxapi.com*" OR Web.url="*api.dropboxapi.com*" OR Web.url="*webdav.yandex.ru*" OR Web.url="*api.box.com*" OR Web.url="*upload.box.com*") by host Web.src Web.user Web.app Web.http_user_agent
| `drop_dm_object_name(Web)`
| rex field=app "(?<proc_lc>(?i)[^\\\\/]+\.exe)$"
| where NOT match(proc_lc,"(?i)^(chrome|firefox|msedge|iexplore|brave|opera|safari|outlook|teams|onedrive|dropbox|pcloud|yandexdisk|boxdrive|boxsync|msoffice|excel|winword|powerpnt)\.exe$")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| sort 0 - count
ucs.kql:
// APT37 RoKRAT cloud-storage C2 — non-browser/non-sync process beaconing to pCloud / Yandex Disk / Dropbox / Box APIs
let _cloud_c2_hosts = dynamic([
    "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","www.pcloud.com",
    "cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.com","webdav.yandex.ru",
    "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","api-content.dropbox.com",
    "api.box.com","upload.box.com"
  ]);
let _legit_clients = dynamic([
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe",
    "outlook.exe","teams.exe","onedrive.exe","onedrivestandaloneupdater.exe",
    "dropbox.exe","dropboxupdate.exe","pcloud.exe","yandexdisk.exe",
    "box.exe","boxdrive.exe","boxsync.exe"
  ]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","HttpConnectionInspected")
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| extend HostOnly = tolower(tostring(split(replace_string(replace_string(RemoteUrl,"https://",""),"http://",""),"/")[0]))
| where HostOnly in (_cloud_c2_hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_legit_clients)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(Timestamp, 1m)),
            UniqueHosts = make_set(HostOnly, 10),
            SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine),
            ProcSHA256 = any(InitiatingProcessSHA256)
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| where ConnCount >= 3                  // RoKRAT polls — at least a few beats
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Generic 'process talks to Dropbox' fires on every desktop. The combination of (a) the EXACT hostnames RoKRAT/M2RAT samples have used since 2017 (api.pcloud.com, cloud-api.yandex.net, content.dropboxapi.com, api.box.com), (b) emanating from a non-browser, non-sync-client process, (c) under a non-machine account, is unique to ScarCruft tradecraft. APT37 picked these services specifically because the

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 LNK-archive self-extracting payload chain (findstr + certutil/PowerShell on %~dpnx0)
ucs.description: Catches APT37's 2022-2024 LNK-in-ZIP/ISO delivery chain (RoKRAT, GOLDBACKDOOR, M2RAT). The LNK shortcut, double-clicked from Explorer/an archive viewer, spawns cmd.exe or powershell.exe that uses findstr/Get-Content + certutil -decode / FromBase64String to carve an embedded payload out of the LNK file itself (referenced as %~dpnx0 / %~f0 / $MyInvocation). This 'fileless' self-extracting LNK is a Reaper/ScarCruft signature documented by Check Point, Cisco Talos and AhnLab.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as proc_path values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("explorer.exe","7zfm.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe","bandizip.exe","alzip.exe","haozip.exe","opera.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","outlook.exe") Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") (Processes.process="*%~dpnx0*" OR Processes.process="*%~f0*" OR Processes.process="*MyInvocation*" OR (Processes.process="*findstr*" AND Processes.process="*.lnk*") OR (Processes.process="*Get-Content*" AND Processes.process="*.lnk*")) (Processes.process="*certutil*-decode*" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*[Convert]::FromBase64*" OR Processes.process="*expand*" OR Processes.process="*Out-File*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.dest
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| sort 0 - firstTime
ucs.kql:
// APT37 self-extracting LNK chain — cmd/PowerShell carves an embedded payload out of the LNK on disk
let _lnk_parents = dynamic([
    "explorer.exe","7zfm.exe","7zg.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe","unrar.exe",
    "bandizip.exe","alzip.exe","haozip.exe","peazip.exe",
    "outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe",
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","opera.exe","naver_whale.exe"
  ]);
let _interp = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_lnk_parents)
| where FileName in~ (_interp)
// Self-reference patterns: shortcut script reads itself by path expansion
| extend _cmd_lc = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where _cmd_lc has_any ("%~dpnx0", "%~f0", "%~dp0", "$myinvocation", "myinvocation.mycommand")
   or (_cmd_lc has ".lnk" and _cmd_lc has_any ("findstr", "get-content", "[io.file]::read"))
// Decoder pattern: extracted blob is base64/quoted-printable/cab-decoded then written/executed
| where _cmd_lc has_any (
    "certutil -decode", "certutil  -decode", "certutil -urlcache",
    "frombase64string", "[convert]::frombase64",
    "expand ", "makecab",
    "start-process", "invoke-expression", "iex ", " iex(", "cmd /c", "rundll32")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentPath    = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd     = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Interpreter   = FileName,
          ChildCmd      = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256   = SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 self-extracting LNK chain — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688 view
let _lnk_parents = dynamic(["explorer.exe","7zfm.exe","7zg.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe","unrar.exe",
    "bandizip.exe","alzip.exe","haozip.exe","peazip.exe","outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe",
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","opera.exe","naver_whale.exe"]);
let _interp = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1])),
         CmdLc      = tolower(CommandLine)
| where ParentLeaf in (_lnk_parents)
| where ChildLeaf  in (_interp)
| where CmdLc has_any ("%~dpnx0","%~f0","%~dp0","$myinvocation","myinvocation.mycommand")
   or  (CmdLc has ".lnk" and CmdLc has_any ("findstr","get-content","[io.file]::read"))
| where CmdLc has_any ("certutil -decode","certutil  -decode","certutil -urlcache",
                       "frombase64string","[convert]::frombase64",
                       "expand ","makecab",
                       "start-process","invoke-expression","iex "," iex(","cmd /c","rundll32")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentLeaf, ChildLeaf, NewProcessName, ParentProcessName, CommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 (ScarCruft) Self-Extracting LNK Payload Carving Chain
id: 7b8a9c1d-37ab-4d52-9e7c-apt37-lnk-self-extract
status: experimental
description: Detects APT37's LNK delivery pattern where a shortcut launched from Explorer or an archiver invokes cmd/PowerShell to read the LNK file itself (%~dpnx0 / $MyInvocation) and decode an embedded base64/cab payload via certutil -decode or FromBase64String.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2022/cloudy-with-a-chance-of-rokrat/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-analysis/
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.t1140
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\explorer.exe'
      - '\7zfm.exe'
      - '\7zg.exe'
      - '\winrar.exe'
      - '\rar.exe'
      - '\unrar.exe'
      - '\bandizip.exe'
      - '\alzip.exe'
      - '\haozip.exe'
      - '\peazip.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\opera.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  selection_self_ref:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '%~dpnx0'
      - '%~f0'
      - '%~dp0'
      - '$MyInvocation'
      - 'MyInvocation.MyCommand'
  selection_decoder:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'certutil -decode'
      - 'certutil  -decode'
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '[Convert]::FromBase64'
      - 'expand '
      - 'makecab'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child and selection_self_ref and selection_decoder
falsepositives:
  - Internally signed self-extracting LNK installers (rare)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Generic 'cmd.exe spawned by explorer.exe' is enormous noise. The triple condition — (a) parent is Explorer or a Korean-market archiver (Bandizip/ALZip/Haozip — heavily favoured by APT37's South Korean targets), (b) child interpreter command line carves the parent LNK by self-reference (%~dpnx0 / $MyInvocation), and (c) a decoder primitive (certutil -decode / FromBase64String / makecab) appears in
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
